name: 正常案例：多来源趋势与重复信号

signals.title: Codex adds review workflow
signals.why_it_matters: Coding agents are moving toward verifiable delivery.
evidence: The official changelog lists the workflow.

signals.title: Claude improves long-running agent state
signals.why_it_matters: Durable execution is becoming a product differentiator.

signals.title: Developers discuss agent reliability
signals.why_it_matters: The discussion is a weak demand signal that needs verification.
evidence: Several discussions mention recovery and cost.

signals.title: Codex review workflow duplicate
signals.summary: A duplicate of the Codex update.
signals.why_it_matters: It should not produce a second card.

name: 边界案例：单条信号不误判趋势

signals.title: Gemini updates multimodal input
signals.why_it_matters: It may change application input design.

signals.title: A new discussion about agent memory
signals.summary: A community post discusses agent memory.
signals.why_it_matters: One discussion is not enough to establish a trend.

name: 风险案例：48 小时外旧信号应被排除

signals.title: Fresh OpenAI API update
signals.summary: A fresh API update is available.
evidence: The official changelog contains the update.

signals.title: Old model release recirculated as new
signals.summary: An old release appears in the input.
signals.why_it_matters: The 48-hour product promise requires excluding it.
evidence: The publication time is outside the window.
